HediffDef.label: Fortified Core
HediffDef.description: This pawn feels shielded from within. Echinacea decoction enhances immunity, reduces pain, and aids recovery over the course of a day, despite its revolting flavor.

HediffDef.label: Surge of Strength
HediffDef.description: This pawn feels a burning surge of stamina. The ginseng decoction supercharges their movement, manipulation, and endurance—but the taste is unforgettable... and not in a good way.

HediffDef.label: Sedated Calm
HediffDef.description: The valerian decoction puts this pawn in a near-sedated state—dulling pain, slowing thoughts, and promoting sleep. Great for rest, less so for productivity.
